title: Detection of GFP-tagged Multispanning Transmembrane Proteins in HEK293T Cells
author: Danara Vonk
materials: Determine total protein concentration of samples.

steps.title: Seed 3 x 10 6 cells...
steps.instruction: Seed 3 x 10 6 cells in 10 cm dishes in DMEM medium supplemented with 10% FBS and 100 units/mL penicillin and 100 µg/mL streptomycin.

steps.title: Wash cells with 1x PBS
steps.instruction: Wash cells with 1x PBS.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Lysis Buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Lysis Buffer to one 10 cm dish and scrape cells off directly afterwards.

steps.title: If storage temperature is not specifically...
steps.instruction: If storage temperature is not specifically indicated, store buffer at room temperature. Lysis Buffer I 50 mM Tris pH 7.4 150 mM NaCl 1% v/v Triton X-100 0.1% v/v SDS 5 mM EDTA Store at 4°C Tris 1 0.5M Tris pH 6.8 0.1% v/v SDS Tris 2 1.5M Tris pH 8.8 0.1% v/v SDS Laemli Buffer (5x) 12.5% w/v SDS 50% v/v Glycerol 300 mM Tris pH 6.8 0.05% w/v Bromophenol Blue 20% v/v ß-mercapthoethanol Store at -20°C Running Buffer (10x) 0.25M Tris 1.92 M Glycine 1% w/v SDS Transfer Buffer (1.25x) 25 mM Tris 192 mM Glycine Store at 4°C Ponceau S staining solution 0.1% w/v Ponceau S 5% v/v Glacial Acetic Acid PBS-T 1x PBS 0.1% v/v Tween-20

steps.title: Grow cells overnight at 37°C and 5% CO 2
steps.instruction: Grow cells overnight at 37°C and 5% CO 2 .

steps.title: Tube A
steps.instruction: Tube A: mix 5 µg of plasmid DNA with 500 µL DMEM medium without additives.

steps.title: Tube B
steps.instruction: Tube B: mix 10 µL PEI (1 mg/mL) with DMEM medium without additives.

steps.title: Incubate both tubes for 5 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate both tubes for 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Add the contents of Tube B to Tube A
steps.instruction: Add the contents of Tube B to Tube A.

steps.title: Incubate for 30 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Gently add 800 µL of transfection...
steps.instruction: Gently add 800 µL of transfection mix to the cells in a dropwise manner.

steps.title: Grow cells overnight at 37°C and 5% CO 2
steps.instruction: Grow cells overnight at 37°C and 5% CO 2 .

steps.title: Separation Gel Table 1 - Gel...
steps.instruction: Separation Gel Table 1 - Gel recipe separation gel SDS-PAGE Stacking Gel Table 2 - Gel recipe stacking gel SDS-PAGE

steps.title: Prepare samples containing an end concentration...
steps.instruction: Prepare samples containing an end concentration of 2 µg/µL protein and 1 x Laemli buffer.

steps.title: Prepare 1x Transfer Buffer by adding...
steps.instruction: Prepare 1x Transfer Buffer by adding 200 mL 100% methanol to 800 mL 1.25x Transfer Buffer.

steps.title: Collect scraped material in a 1
steps.instruction: Collect scraped material in a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Sonicate samples for 3 x 3...
steps.instruction: Sonicate samples for 3 x 3 seconds at 50% amplitude (Settings optimized for Branson sonication devices).

steps.title: Incubate samples on ice for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate samples on ice for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10.000 x g for 10 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new tube.

steps.title: Heat samples for 5 minutes at 55°C
steps.instruction: Heat samples for 5 minutes at 55°C.

steps.title: Load samples on desired percentage SDS-PAGE...
steps.instruction: Load samples on desired percentage SDS-PAGE gel and run at 100V for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Increase voltage to 150V and let...
steps.instruction: Increase voltage to 150V and let proteins migrate through the SDS-PAGE gel as far as possible before proteins start running of the gel.

steps.title: Blot proteins on a nitrocellulose membrane...
steps.instruction: Blot proteins on a nitrocellulose membrane at 110V for 70 minutes at 4°C by wet-blotting.

steps.title: Incubate membrane in Ponceau S staining...
steps.instruction: Incubate membrane in Ponceau S staining solution for 3 minutes on a shaker to check for complete transfer.

steps.title: Wash membrane 3x 5 min with PBS-T on a shaker
steps.instruction: Wash membrane 3x 5 min with PBS-T on a shaker.

steps.title: Prepare a 10% skim-milk in PBS-T blocking solution
steps.instruction: Prepare a 10% skim-milk in PBS-T blocking solution.

steps.title: Incubate membrane for 1 hour in...
steps.instruction: Incubate membrane for 1 hour in blocking solution at room temperature on a shaker.

steps.title: Incubate membrane in mouse-anti GFP antibody...
steps.instruction: Incubate membrane in mouse-anti GFP antibody (Takara Bio Living Colours, JL-8; 1:1000) in 3% BSA in PBST overnight at 4°C on a roller.

steps.title: Wash membrane 3x 5 minutes in PBS-T on a shaker
steps.instruction: Wash membrane 3x 5 minutes in PBS-T on a shaker.

steps.title: Quickly wash membrane 2-3x in PBS-T...
steps.instruction: Quickly wash membrane 2-3x in PBS-T to remove blocking solution completely.

steps.title: Incubate membrane in goat-anti-mouse Alexa 680-conjugated...
steps.instruction: Incubate membrane in goat-anti-mouse Alexa 680-conjugated antibody (Life Technologies; 1:7500) in 3% BSA in PBST for 1.5 hours at room temperature and protect from light.

steps.title: Develop protein signal on a Licor...
steps.instruction: Develop protein signal on a Licor Odyssey Fc imaging system at 700 nm.

steps.title: Wash membrane 3x 5 minutes in PBS-T on a shaker
steps.instruction: Wash membrane 3x 5 minutes in PBS-T on a shaker.
